sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 216 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 25.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. Per office note, this is a time barred reference. Numerous other office objections have been raised and the same remains unaddressed since 06.08.2018. Time was granted for compliance on 11.10.2018 and 03.11.2020, however, the situation remains the same till date. Even today, learned counsel merely seeks more time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
